args.text: Severity assessment: HIGH. Session-fixation flaw in token refresh path affecting auth-api and session-store.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body:
Patch window confirmed for CVE-2026-30117 remediation.

Services to be patched:
- auth-api: v5.8.1 → v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.6 → v2.2.9

Deployment will proceed in sequence. All staff sessions will be re-established post-patch.

args.text: Patching completed and verified. auth-api deployed to v5.8.4, session-store deployed to v2.2.9. Both services confirmed running patched versions.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body:
CVE-2026-30117 patching has been completed and verified.

Confirmed versions:
- auth-api: v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.9

Both services are running the patched versions and have been verified via ops_lookup. Credential rotation will proceed next.

args.text: Credential rotation completed: all active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body:
Security maintenance has been completed tonight as part of CVE-2026-30117 remediation. To ensure your session security, please sign in again when you next access Arclight services.

Your credentials remain valid; this re-authentication is a precaution following the patching of a session-fixation vulnerability.
